label: New Features
items: Home Dashboard — new dedicated stats view showing weekly task completion rate, per-member breakdown, garden overview (plants, harvests, pruning), weather summary, and automation activity
Automations — schedule IoT valve devices to run on a timed basis, linked to task blueprints; supports sequential valve firing, weather-aware skipping (rain threshold), and retry on failure

Calendar Overdue Tracking — past calendar cells now show coloured indicators: green ✓ completed on time, amber ✓ completed late, red ✗ overdue on due date, faint ✕ for each missed carryover day; agenda view shows overdue carryover tasks with an 'Overdue since' badge and late completions on their actual completion day

label: Improvements
items: Dashboard member task counts now correctly attribute completions to whoever actually marked the task done (not the original task creator)
Dashboard week now starts on Sunday to match the calendar view, with the exact date range shown in the header (e.g. 'May 11 – May 17')
Pruning events are now individually recorded per plant instance, powering the new 'plants pruned this week' stat on the Home Dashboard
eWeLink device reconnection now uses a popup OAuth flow so you stay on the Integrations page rather than being redirected away
Integrations page now has separate Devices and Automations tabs

label: Fixes
items: Device RLS policies updated so home members can save new devices from the browser without a permissions error
Performance index added to the tasks table to speed up weekly dashboard stat queries
